name: patrat
flavor_texts: Using food stored in cheek pouches, they can keep watch for days. They use their tails to communicate with others.
Extremely cautious, they take shifts to maintain a constant watch of their nest. They feel insecure without a lookout.
Extremely cautious, one of them will always be on the lookout, but it won’t notice a foe coming from behind.
text: Patrat is the Scout Pokémon. It is a normal-type Pokémon. Abilities: run-away, keen-eye, analytic (hidden). Base stats — HP: 45, Attack: 55, Defense: 39, Sp. Atk: 35, Sp. Def: 39, Speed: 42. Evolution line: patrat → watchog. Lore: Using food stored in cheek pouches, they can keep watch for days. They use their tails to communicate with others. Extremely cautious, they take shifts to maintain a constant watch of their nest. They feel insecure without a lookout. Extremely cautious, one of them will always be on the lookout, but it won’t notice a foe coming from behind.
